description_long: This car store is a modern, single-story commercial building with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front facade features a large glass section, allowing visibility into the showroom where several cars are displayed. The property is surrounded by a wooden fence and landscaped with hedges and small trees, providing a welcoming and upscale appearance. There is a driveway and parking area in front, with multiple cars parked along the street and within the lot. The rear of the building includes a private outdoor area, possibly for staff or exclusive customers, with additional landscaping and a small patio. The overall structure is composed of concrete, glass, and wood, with a focus on open space and natural light.
description: A modern, flat-roofed car store with a glass-front showroom, landscaped grounds, and multiple cars displayed both inside and outside.
description_view_0: Front view shows the glass facade, main entrance, and several cars parked along the street and in front of the building.
description_view_1: Rear view highlights the private outdoor area, wooden fencing, and landscaped backyard, with the building's solid rear wall visible.
description_view_2: Side view displays the length of the building, the driveway, and the transition from the public street to the private lot.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the main entrance steps, additional landscaping, and a partial view of the showroom through the glass facade.
attribute_displayed_cars: Six cars visible: various makes and models, in colors including red, white, yellow, pink, and beige, arranged in front of the building and along the street.
attribute_glass_facade: Large glass panels on the front facade, full-height, providing visibility into the showroom.
